summary: Fixed test environment issues: changed vitest from node to jsdom, renamed useKeyboardShortcuts.ts to .tsx (contains JSX), fixed LocationList tests to use correct EmptyState text assertions. All 2565 client tests and 232 server tests pass.
next_action: Resolve App.tsx TypeScript parsing issue (TS17008: unclosed div). The issue appears to be in the JSX structure but manual inspection shows correct closing tags. May be a parser bug or hidden character issue.
